# A finding that bloats a MISSION cell wants to be a note

> lesson · personal · workshop · 2026-06-05

## What
When a finding bloats a MISSION table cell, it is durable knowledge trying to become a note.

## Why it matters
MISSION should preserve sequencing and design intent; notes preserve reusable knowledge.
